subject: Your RAG is lying to you

From our partner, Cautious Optimism

The Compute Doomers Are Wrong

As AI coding tools have gotten better, people are using more and more of them, and we can’t support everyone’s demand. Blocking new individual sign-ups for a product that probably eats more off the enterprise table is not a bad business move, but it is an interesting indication of compute drought all the same.

The Compute Doomers Are Wrong

As AI coding tools have gotten better, people are using more and more of them, and we can’t support everyone’s demand. Blocking new individual sign-ups for a product that probably eats more off the enterprise table is not a bad business move, but it is an interesting indication of compute drought all the same.

TDS Daily

Each day, we bring you a fresh mix of trending topics, practical tutorials, and thought-provoking reads from across the data-science landscape. Whether you're exploring machine learning, AI, or data engineering, you'll find something to spark new ideas and keep you ahead of the curve.
